mapper.sql: t1.FIVE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.FIVE_NO, t1.ATTR9, t1.ATTR4, t1.FIVE_NAME, t1.ATTR3, t1.ATTR2, t1.ATTR1, t1.ID, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.FIVE_SITUATION, t1.ATTR8, t1.ATTR7, t1.ATTR20, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.ATTR6, t1.ATTR5, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.ATTR12, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.ATTR13, t1.ATTR10, t1.POSEN_TEL, t1.ATTR11, t1.ATTR16, t1.ATTR17, t1.ATTR14, t1.ATTR15, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.ATTR18, t1.ATTR19, t1.FIVE_EFFECT, t1.FIVE_DEPT, t1.FIVE_POSITION, t1.FIVE_PROSPECTS, t1.POSEN_NAME, t1.VERSION, t1.FVIE_AGE, t1.FIVE_DECLARATIONS, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.FIVE_PROBLEM, t1.FIVE_MEASURES

if.test: bean.bpmType != null and bean.bpmType != '' and bean.bpmType == 'my'

sql.if: and exists (select 1 from BPM_CLIENT_HIST_TASK_V os where os.task_b_id_ = t1.id and os.assignee_ = #{bean.currUserId})

if.test: bean.bpmState != null and bean.bpmState != '' and bean.bpmState != 'all'

mapper.select:
select
from DYN_FIVE_OF t1 left join BPM_CLIENT_HIST_PROCINST_V v on t1.id = v.formid_

select
from DYN_FIVE_OF t1 left join sys_bpm_hist_procinst v on t1.id = v.formid_

select
from DYN_FIVE_OF t1 left join sys_bpm_hist_procinst v on t1.id = v.formid_
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc

select
from DYN_FIVE_OF t1 left join BPM_HIST_PROCINST t3 ON t3.FORMID_ = t1.id where t1.id = #{id} and t3.BUSINESSSTATE_ = 'ended'
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_FIVE_OF
FIVE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
FIVE_NO,
ATTR9,
ATTR4,
FIVE_NAME,
ATTR3,
ATTR2,
ATTR1,
ID,
CREATED_DEPT,
FIVE_SITUATION,
ATTR8,
ATTR7,
ATTR20,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
ATTR6,
ATTR5,
CREATED_BY,
ATTR12,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ATTR13,
ATTR10,
POSEN_TEL,
ATTR11,
ATTR16,
ATTR17,
ATTR14,
ATTR15,
CREATION_DATE,
ATTR18,
ATTR19,
FIVE_EFFECT,
FIVE_DEPT,
FIVE_POSITION,
FIVE_PROSPECTS,
POSEN_NAME,
VERSION,
FVIE_AGE,
FIVE_DECLARATIONS,
ORG_IDENTITY,
FIVE_PROBLEM,
FIVE_MEASURES,
#{fiveDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{fiveNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fiveName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fiveSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{posenTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{fiveEffect,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fiveDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fivePosition,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fiveProspects,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{posenName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{fvieAge,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fiveDeclarations,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{fiveProblem,jdbcType = CLOB},
#{fiveMeasures,jdbcType = CLOB},

insert into DYN_FIVE_OF( FIVE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , FIVE_NO , ATTR9 , ATTR4 , FIVE_NAME , ATTR3 , ATTR2 , ATTR1 , ID , CREATED_DEPT , FIVE_SITUATION , ATTR8 , ATTR7 , ATTR20 , LAST_UPDATE_IP , ATTR6 , ATTR5 , CREATED_BY , ATTR12 , LAST_UPDATED_BY , ATTR13 , ATTR10 , POSEN_TEL , ATTR11 , ATTR16 , ATTR17 , ATTR14 , ATTR15 , CREATION_DATE , ATTR18 , ATTR19 , FIVE_EFFECT , FIVE_DEPT , FIVE_POSITION , FIVE_PROSPECTS , POSEN_NAME , VERSION , FVIE_AGE , FIVE_DECLARATIONS , ORG_IDENTITY , FIVE_PROBLEM , FIVE_MEASURES )
select #{item.fiveDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.fiveNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fiveName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fiveSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.posenTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.fiveEffect,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fiveDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fivePosition,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fiveProspects,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.posenName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.fvieAge,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fiveDeclarations,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.fiveProblem,jdbcType = CLOB} , #{item.fiveMeasures,jdbcType = CLOB} from dual
mapper.update:
update DYN_FIVE_OF
FIVE_DATE = #{fiveDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
FIVE_NO = #{fiveNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FIVE_NAME = #{fiveName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR1 = #{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FIVE_SITUATION = #{fiveSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POSEN_TEL = #{posenTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
FIVE_EFFECT = #{fiveEffect,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FIVE_DEPT = #{fiveDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FIVE_POSITION = #{fivePosition,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FIVE_PROSPECTS = #{fiveProspects,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POSEN_NAME = #{posenName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
FVIE_AGE = #{fvieAge,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FIVE_DECLARATIONS = #{fiveDeclarations,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
FIVE_PROBLEM = #{fiveProblem,jdbcType = CLOB},
FIVE_MEASURES = #{fiveMeasures,jdbcType = CLOB},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update DYN_FIVE_OF set FIVE_DATE = #{fiveDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FIVE_NO = #{fiveNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR9 = #{attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR4 = #{attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_NAME = #{fiveName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR1 = #{attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_SITUATION = #{fiveSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR5 = #{attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR12 = #{attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR13 = #{attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR10 = #{attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POSEN_TEL = #{posenTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR11 = #{attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR16 = #{attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR17 = #{attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR18 = #{attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR19 = #{attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FIVE_EFFECT = #{fiveEffect,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_DEPT = #{fiveDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_POSITION = #{fivePosition,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_PROSPECTS = #{fiveProspects,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POSEN_NAME = #{posenName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , FVIE_AGE = #{fvieAge,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_DECLARATIONS = #{fiveDeclarations,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_PROBLEM = #{fiveProblem,jdbcType = CLOB} , FIVE_MEASURES = #{fiveMeasures,jdbcType = CLOB} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_FIVE_OF set FIVE_DATE = #{item.fiveDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FIVE_NO = #{item.fiveNo,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR9 = #{item.attr9,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR4 = #{item.attr4,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_NAME = #{item.fiveName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR3 = #{item.attr3,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR2 = #{item.attr2,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR1 = #{item.attr1,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_SITUATION = #{item.fiveSituation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR8 = #{item.attr8,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR7 = #{item.attr7,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR20 = #{item.attr20,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR6 = #{item.attr6,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR5 = #{item.attr5,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR12 = #{item.attr12,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR13 = #{item.attr13,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR10 = #{item.attr10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POSEN_TEL = #{item.posenTel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR11 = #{item.attr11,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR16 = #{item.attr16,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR17 = #{item.attr17,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR14 = #{item.attr14,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTR15 = #{item.attr15,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR18 = #{item.attr18,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , ATTR19 = #{item.attr19,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FIVE_EFFECT = #{item.fiveEffect,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_DEPT = #{item.fiveDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_POSITION = #{item.fivePosition,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_PROSPECTS = #{item.fiveProspects,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POSEN_NAME = #{item.posenName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , FVIE_AGE = #{item.fvieAge,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_DECLARATIONS = #{item.fiveDeclarations,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , FIVE_PROBLEM = #{item.fiveProblem,jdbcType = CLOB} , FIVE_MEASURES = #{item.fiveMeasures,jdbcType = CLOB} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.update: update bpm_hist_procinst set title_ = #{title} where formid_ = #{fromid}
mapper.select:
select
from dyn_five_of t1 where t1.id = #{id}
